rows.label: tlk4730016801_msg0001
rows.name:
Hey! I am wondering what
we should do with this building.

rows.label: tlk4730016801_msg0002
rows.name:
It's looking the worse for wear,
so it needs repairing, that's for
sure. The question is, how?

rows.label: tlk4730016801_msg0003
rows.name:
Could use it for storage, but that'd
be a waste. If we turn it into a
house, there's no one to live in it!

rows.label: tlk4730016801_msg0004
rows.name:
Unless Rex brings a wife here
and settles down. That would
solve all our problems!

rows.label: tlk4730016801_msg0104
rows.name:
Unless Rex brings a wife here
and settles down. That would
solve all our problems!
